title: No Gui FD
description: You can use a new cooking pot without GUI!
body:
**_Let's remove the GUI and see something more immersive!_**
You can use a new cooking pot without GUI!
Right click on the item in Pot to swap it with the item in your hand.

**_Of course, you can still use GUI_**
you can right-click on all faces of Pot to open the GUI, except for the top.
 
This mod depends on Farmars Delight.
